title: Proclamation No. 860, s. 1992
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 860

DECLARING TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 18, 1992, AS A SPECIAL DAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF UNISAN, PROVINCE OF QUEZON

WHEREAS, Tuesday, February 18, 1992, marks the 115th Foundation Anniversary of the Municipality of Unisan, Province of Quezon;

WHEREAS, it is fitting that the people of the Municipality of Unisan, Province of Quezon, be given full opportunity to celebrate this milestone in their municipality’s history with appropriate ceremonies;

NOW, THEREFORE, I, CORAZON C. AQUINO, President of the Philippines, by virtue of the powers vested in me by Book I, Chapter 7, Section 27, of the Administrative Code of 1987, do hereby declare Tuesday, February 18, 1992, as a special day in the Municipality of Unisan, Province of Quezon.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 12th day of February, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and ninety two.

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

By the President: (Sgd.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
